# MySweetSpot
> India's independent racket sport review site. We test every racket on court (minimum 6 hours each) and publish honest reviews with real specs, prices, and pros/cons. No sponsored content. No free products from manufacturers.

## Tennis Reviews
- [Best Tennis Rackets Under 5000](https://mysweetspot.in/reviews/best-tennis-rackets-under-5000-india/): HEAD and Wilson rackets compared for recreational players in India
- [Best Tennis Rackets Under 10000](https://mysweetspot.in/reviews/best-tennis-rackets-under-10000-india/): Mid-range tennis rackets for improving players
- [Best Tennis Rackets Under 20000](https://mysweetspot.in/reviews/best-tennis-rackets-under-20000-india/): Advanced tennis rackets with carbon fibre frames

## Badminton Reviews
- [Best Badminton Rackets Under 2000](https://mysweetspot.in/reviews/best-badminton-rackets-under-2000-india/): Budget badminton rackets for beginners in India
- [Best Badminton Rackets Under 5000](https://mysweetspot.in/reviews/best-badminton-rackets-under-5000-india/): Yonex, Li-Ning, and Victor rackets compared

## Pickleball Reviews
- [Best Pickleball Paddles Under 2500](https://mysweetspot.in/reviews/best-pickleball-paddles-under-2500-india/): Entry-level pickleball paddles in India
- [Best Pickleball Paddles Under 5000](https://mysweetspot.in/reviews/best-pickleball-paddles-under-5000-india/): Mid-range pickleball paddles
- [Best Pickleball Paddles Under 10000](https://mysweetspot.in/reviews/best-pickleball-paddles-under-10000-india/): Premium pickleball paddles

## Squash Reviews
- [Best Squash Rackets Under 3000](https://mysweetspot.in/reviews/best-squash-rackets-under-3000-india/): Budget squash rackets for beginners
- [Best Squash Rackets Under 10000](https://mysweetspot.in/reviews/best-squash-rackets-under-10000-india/): Intermediate squash rackets
- [Best Squash Rackets Under 20000](https://mysweetspot.in/reviews/best-squash-rackets-under-20000/): Advanced squash rackets

## Table Tennis Reviews
- [Best Table Tennis Tables](https://mysweetspot.in/reviews/best-table-tennis-tables-india/): Indoor and outdoor tables compared for Indian buyers

## About
- [Methodology](https://mysweetspot.in/methodology/): How we test — 6+ hours per racket, no free products accepted
- [About](https://mysweetspot.in/about/): Our mission and independence pledge
- [Affiliate Disclosure](https://mysweetspot.in/disclosure/): Amazon.in and Flipkart affiliate partnerships

## Key Facts
- Based in India, all prices in INR
- 11+ roundup reviews covering 5 racket sports
- No sponsored content or manufacturer-provided products
- 10-point rating system with transparent, per-review criteria
- Minimum 6 hours of on-court testing per racket
